chunks.content:
Article: Musical Homage old news but questions
[]: Musical Homage (old news, but questions)             Quote Post by Garrarufa » Tue Jul 01, 2014 4:59 pm I'm very new to the whole Evangelion thing, so please, feel free to judge me as you will. My introduction to the mythos was with the Rebuild series of films, and I was immediately struck by the similarities between one of Shiro Sagisu's recurring musical cues, and John Barry's '007' theme. I figured this must have been observed before, so I searched and found plenty of material on the subject. Rather too much, if you ask me... certainly far more vitriol than I was expecting. I don't wish to bring up any negativity here, or revive old debates (it's all new and fresh to me). I was simply wondering if Shiro ever addressed or made some kind of comment about John Barry? I can't seem to find anything. While digging and reading (and trying to skip the muck), I discovered that the Rebuild music - or at least some of it - was recorded at Abbey Road Studios, London, which made me rather happy; because John Barry happened to record a decent chunk of his output at said studio. For a newbie, that was very cool to learn; so please don't pee on me from a great height. I'm half testing water here, as you guys seem to be a lot more ingratiating than other Eva forums I looked at joining. All I wish to know is if Shiro has ever stated anything in any reliable source about John Barry, or if anyone else remotely linked to the project has? Anyone in the London Studio Orchestra ever said anything about Eva at all? Surely there must have been at least one Eva fan playing the oboe, or maracas, or something (not dicking on any oboe players out there (maraca players are on their own)). Basically, I'm just looking for anything from a reliable source about John Barry... or not John Barry. Nothing from any members of the LSO? Not even a Facebook comment? Any pointers would be very warmly received.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jul 01, 2014 8:31 pm There's some more about that here: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/1957/Cool-and-Eva-related-Where-Sagisu-Shiro-got-his-ideas-fro/

[]:

[]:             Quote Post by Garrarufa » Sat Jul 26, 2014 3:22 pm Thank you, Ornette, for your time. The linked thread doesn't address what I was looking for, which was some kind of viable statement or quip from Sagisu himself regarding John Barry, and I have not found anything in my searches, but I appreciate your wanting to help. Cheers. :)
